title: jasminum campyloneurum
intro: Jasminum campyloneurum, also known as the Brazilian star jasmine or campyloneurum jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Brazil, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Jasminum campyloneurum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
